# 10. Keep clear and accurate records relevant to your practice

Theme: [Practise Effectively](theme-2-practise-effectively.md)

## To achieve this, you must:

- **10.1** Complete all records at the time or as soon as possible after an event
- **10.2** Identify any risks or problems and the steps taken to deal with them
- **10.3** Complete all records accurately and without any falsification
- **10.4** Attribute any entries you make, making sure they are clearly written, dated and timed
- **10.5** Take all steps to make sure records are kept securely
- **10.6** Collect, treat and store all data and research findings appropriately

## Assessed through
- [Platform 1: Being an accountable professional](../platforms/platform-1.md)
- [Platform 3: Assessing needs and planning care](../platforms/platform-3.md)
